description: VCs and institutional investors active in prediction markets, DeFi, and AI+crypto. Updated each RESEARCH scan.

investors.name: Sequoia Capital

recent_activity.action: Led Kalshi Series E at $22B valuation.

investors.notes: Sequoia leading a $1B round into prediction markets validates the sector at the highest tier.

investors.name: CapitalG (Google)
investors.notes: Google's growth equity arm in prediction markets. Unlikely to invest in DeFi-native competitors.

investors.name: 5cc Capital
partners: Noah Zingler-Sternig (Kalshi former head of operations)

recent_activity.action: Launched $35M fund. First dedicated prediction market infrastructure VC. Backed by Polymarket CEO, Kalshi CEO, Marc Andreessen (Moneta Luna), Ribbit Capital (Micky Malka), Millennium Management PM.

investors.target_portfolio: data tools, liquidity provision, compliance systems, infrastructure (NOT just exchanges)
investors.lever_fit: DIRECT MATCH. LEVER is infrastructure. Pitch immediately.

investors.name: ARK Venture Fund (ARK Invest)

recent_activity.action: Participated in Kalshi Series E. Announced systematic integration of Kalshi data for portfolio management and hedging.

investors.notes: ARK is a prediction market believer (data and hedging use case). Not a primary early-stage DeFi VC, but signal.

investors.name: YZi Labs (formerly Binance Labs)

recent_activity.action: Led $25M into Opinion (BNB prediction market: $5M seed + $20M follow-on).

investors.notes: YZi Labs is the kingmaker on BNB Chain for prediction markets. Already deployed capital. XMarket competes with their portfolio companies. Unlikely LP for XMarket, but important to watch.
investors.lever_fit: conflict of interest with XMarket. Low probability for investment.

investors.name: 1confirmation

recent_activity.action: Led $10M seed into Limitless Exchange (Base prediction market).

investors.notes: Has prediction market interest. Limitless is on Base (same as LEVER). Monitor for potential conflict.

investors.name: Ribbit Capital

recent_activity.action: Micky Malka invested in 5cc Capital (first prediction market VC fund).

investors.notes: Fintech VC with growing prediction market interest via 5cc Capital LP position.
